title: 決戦☆あんし～んよ永遠に！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since the Bamboo Stakes, Sasami Anshinzawa and
I have continued winning race after race together.
And now our final goal, the Sasabari Sho, is about
to begin!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
The time has finally come! Thinking back, we've
been through a lot, haven't we?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
There was the Fan Fest, summer camp, Valentines
Day, as well as the winter holidays... The list just
goes on and on! ♪
choice_data_list:
None of that happened, though... Unless? Come
to think of it, maybe they did all happen.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
What, having trouble getting your head in the
game right before the main event? Don't be
nervous, you'll be fine!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, you're my partner! You've been working
hard with me while still keeping at your trainer
duties and even doing solo training!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Of course I did! I've been watching everything you
do! I'm a fan of yours, after all!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I have full confidence that you'll be the one to
conquer the Needle Series.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you just how much faith I have in you
with these needles!
choice_data_list: Come at me, and don't hold back!
I'd appreciate it if you'd prioritize my safety!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Leave it to me! ☆ Are you ready?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Here it comes! Annnd poke!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Puncture Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
See?! I didn't botch it up! You were always in safe
hands! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if cradled by the sea's anodyne embrace, I find
the courage to set off towards the track—the
stage of my final showdown.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh! No, nothing's wrong! Anyways, aren't you
feeling better now?
choice_data_list: It's no good... I don't feel relaxed at all!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
D-don't worry! I know you can do it! You've come
this far, haven't you?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Regardless of how I'm feeling, today's race will
decide the victor. At this point, I have no choice
but to do what I can.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I always prioritize your safety! ☆ Well, are you
ready?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Here it comes! Annnd poke!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Puncture Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Woohoo! ☆ Look, your skin's clear and dewy, and
you look ready for anything and everything! That
was a great success, if I say so myself! ♪
choice_data_list: Wow! I feel like I can take on the world now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With my body in perfect condition thanks to the
acupuncture session, I set off towards the
track—the stage of my final showdown.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Huh? Is it just me, or did that not do much?
choice_data_list: I don't feel like anything's changed...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
That can't be! Sure, my needle was off by a teeny
tiny bit, but that shouldn't have been a
problem! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I still feel doubtful, but regardless, the victor will
be decided here at today's race. At this point, I
have no choice but to do what I can.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Keep it up! Show us your nice and stable running!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Wow! ☆ Such incredible acceleration! Wait, could
this be the work of who I think it might be?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ Well, Isami? Liking what you see? That's
my pride and joy of a partner out there!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Aw, come on! ☆ I told you to call me "Beauty
Anshinzawa"! But back to the point...

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: He's a beaut, that's for sure! ♪

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: She's a beaut, that's for sure! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
All will be well. I'm sure your trainer will come out
victorious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That day at the Sasabari Sho, the first to cross
the finish line amidst an eruption of cheers turned
out to be none other than...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... You did it, partner! You came in first place with flying colors! Sob!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
You sure did! With this, both our names will be
forever remembered in the history of acupunc—

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, silly me! This isn't the time for this!
<username>, congratulations
on winning!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Let me offer my felicitations as
well—congratulations! <chrname> is
also over the moon! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If my performance here today was able to
positively influence <chrname>...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then there's no greater reassurance and joy than
that.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: By the way...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: How exactly did things come to this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tazuna's question is a completely reasonable and
valid one, and honestly, I can't blame her for
asking.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Huh, their running form looks off... It's lacking the
usual worriless gait.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Wow! ☆ Wait, could this be the work of who I
think it might be?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Shoot, we got overtaken! This is all because I
messed up that acupuncture session!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
What a surprise... I didn't think you'd actually
acknowledge your own mistake.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's harsh! What, you think I'd blame my
partner? Even I wouldn't do that!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
We've been through so much together as trainer
and racer...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I've watched him every step of the way, so I know
all too well just how much effort he's put in!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I've watched her every step of the way, so I know
all too well just how much effort she's put in!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It seems like I may have been wrong about you all
this time...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That day at the Sasabari Sho, the first to cross
the finish line amidst an eruption of cheers turned
out to be none other than...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Aww, c'mon! There's no need to be so depressed!
You did a great job! ☆
choice_data_list: But I really wanted to win...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It looks like you had trouble breaking out from
traffic...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But if you train for more power, it will help you
make your way through next time!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Precisely! Sure, the Needle Series may have come
to an end...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
But I'd love to keep working with you! Doesn't
that sound like a wonderful idea? Let's keep
chasing after our dreams! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although I fell short of the goal Sasami
Anshinzawa and I set our sights on, the time I
spent with her has definitely been worthwhile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I believe the experience I've accumulated will
help shape my future into one of bright hope,
free of worry.
